events.title: Anna Moss High Sierra Kickoff Ft. Opening Set by Sari Jordan
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS It’s Day Zero of the inaugural High Sierra Music Festival in Grass Valley. Before all the music lovers in the region embark on an adventure they’ll never forget, it’s the great honor of the Crazy Horse Saloon to be the launching point. What you will witness here on this Wednesday night is an encapsulation of the spirit of the festival itself. Love and connectivity transmitted in the form of heartfelt, improvisational music. There could not be a more appropriate artist to represe
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Bassline
events.description: BASSLINE is back — deeper, dirtier, and sexier than ever. Join us for a night of cutting-edge underground sounds, featuring the best in bass music, UK garage, 140, and sexy house. Curated and hosted by twin DJs DUST + BEAU, this edition of BASSLINE showcases an all-star lineup of exceptional artists and selectors pushing the boundaries of forward-thinking sound. events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Kronosaurus Flex
events.description: Hailing originally from the heartland of Wisconsin, Kronosaurus Flex is as American as a Chevy and apple pie. What better way to celebrate the stars and stripes than with a marathon set drawn from one of the hottest wax collections in the region. A pillar of the local scene since the early days, Kronosaurus has relentlessly evolved over the years. More recently he has earned acclaim as the host of the Cretaceous Space on KVMRX. He brings an all-vinyl arsenal of deep cuts to evoke the most powerf
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: The Geezer Gig
events.description: Over fifteen years running and still going strong, this “Second Friday Tradition” is as reliable as the tides. You definitely don’t have to be a geezer to appreciate this community pow wow. Bob Woods is the most eminently tasteful guitarist in the foothills. The lifelong railroad man is too good to be this humble, while firmly planted behind the wheel of the locomotive. Doubling as a member of ZZ Top, drummer Skip Alan Smith relishes his role in powering the steam engine of the groove. Retro-coo
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Matt Axton & Bad Moon
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Some people say that songwriting is in their blood, but for Matt Axton, he’s got the lineage to back it up. His grandmother, Mae Boren Axton, co-wrote “Heartbreak Hotel” for Elvis Presley. His dad, legendary singer-songwriter Hoyt Axton, penned songs for Three Dog Night and Steppenwolf. Born in Lake Tahoe and now based in LA, Matt is carrying on the family tradition with a gusto all his own. Like a human jukebox, he’s got 300 of his own songs ready to go for our listening and da
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Moga Family Band w/ Cheyenne Skye & Brian Coe
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS The Moga Family Band are a rising star of the Nashville music scene blending super soulful vocals and funky hooks with jamband sensibilities. What started as a local secret is steadily blossoming into a national phenomenon. Fresh off their victory in the 2026 American Songwriter Road Read Talent Contest, the band is well on its way to cementing its status as festival favorites, securing spots at High Sierra Music Festival and Rooster Walk in Virginia.
